name: FlowFuse
description: FlowFuse (formerly FlowForge) — Node-RED based DevOps platform for industrial and IoT automation. Managed hosting, SSO, and team collaboration.

seo.title: FlowFuse — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: FlowFuse: FlowFuse (formerly FlowForge) — Node-RED based DevOps platform for industrial and IoT automation. Managed hosting, SSO, and team collaboration.

when_to_use: DevOps platform for managing Node-RED IoT automation flows
Deploying and versioning industrial automation workflows
Multi-user Node-RED with team collaboration and SSO
Managed Node-RED hosting for manufacturing and IoT pipelines
Continuous delivery for Node-RED flows in enterprise settings

pros: Team features solve Node-RED's multi-user gap
Good fit for IoT and industrial automation
SSO and environments help production ops
cons: Niche audience outside IoT and OT space
Smaller user base than generic iPaaS tools
Pricing at scale not always the cheapest
review.verdict: Best way to run Node-RED in production for IoT teams; too niche for general integration work.
review.best_for: IoT and industrial teams running Node-RED flows in production
review.not_for: Business-automation teams needing a generic SaaS iPaaS

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
